contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference on an amdgpu_bo object by calling amdgpu_bo_free_kernel. It takes a double pointer to the buffer object and likely sets the pointer to NULL after freeing. After calling this function, the caller must not use the original pointer value. This operation represents the end of the object's lifecycle from the caller's perspective.
